name: Codestral 22B
note: Mistral's first dedicated code model; fill-in-the-middle across 80+ programming languages, 32K context, non-commercial MNPL license.
tpsNote: Fits a single RTX 4090 at Q4_K_M (~18GB); no single authoritative tok/s benchmark found

verificationNotes: Confirmed via HF model page and config.json: 22.2B params, MNPL-0.1 license, 32K context (max_position_embeddings). Fetched analyticsvidhya.com directly: literally confirms '81.1% pass rate on HumanEval' and '78.2% success rate in MBPP'. No changes made.
